title: On Macroscopic Intricate States
summary: The present contribution is in the field of quantum modelling of macroscopic phenomena. The focus is on one  enigmatic aspect of quantum physics, namely the Einstein-Podolsky-Rosen paradox and entanglement. After a review of the state of the art concerning macroscopic quantum effects and quantum interaction, this contribution proposes a link between embryology and acupuncture  in the framework of macroscopic intricate states induced by quantum mechanics.
